title: Yggdrasil
description:
This plugin allows the transfer of players and their inventories across servers. (Custom Data Components are also transferred).

Essentially increasing the connectivity of players and data. This is currently targeted towards survival players
body:
This is a project is for enabling servers and their players to interact with each other. The plugin introduces the saving of player inventories through the new cookie saving feature. These cookies are read on server join/transfer and enables the persitance of player inventories across multiple servers. 

To use this plugin, download the file and paste it into the appropirate `plugins` folder found on your server. (Note: Currently only supports Paper Servers!). The plugin will prompt you to change `server.properties`. It is highly recommended you enable a `whitelist` on your server. 

After setup is complete use the /transfer_player command to change to another Yggdrasil server and your items will be persisted.
